columns.name: inventory_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each inventory record.

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Unique identifier of the product stored in inventory.

columns.name: warehouse_id
columns.description: Unique identifier of the warehouse where inventory is stored.

columns.name: stock_quantity
columns.description: Current available inventory quantity that can be allocated to customer demand. Primary measure used for inventory reporting, stock availability analysis, inventory turnover calculations, replenishment planning, demand forecasting, and stockout prevention.

columns.name: reserved_quantity
columns.description: Inventory quantity reserved for confirmed customer orders and unavailable for new allocations. Used for inventory allocation analysis, available-to-promise calculations, order fulfillment monitoring, and demand planning.

columns.name: reorder_level
columns.description: Minimum inventory threshold that triggers replenishment activity. Used for inventory optimization, safety stock monitoring, replenishment planning, stockout prevention, and supply planning processes.

columns.name: unit_cost
columns.description: Cost per unit of the product in inventory.

columns.name: inventory_status
columns.description: Current inventory status such as In Stock, Low Stock, Out of Stock, or Expired.

columns.name: batch_number
columns.description: Batch or lot number associated with the inventory item.

columns.name: expiry_date
columns.description: Expiration date associated with the inventory batch or lot. Used for inventory aging analysis, shelf-life monitoring, product quality compliance, waste reduction initiatives, and expiry risk reporting.

columns.name: last_stock_update
columns.description: Timestamp when inventory quantity was last updated.

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the inventory record was created.

columns.name: shipment_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each shipment.

columns.name: order_id
columns.description: Reference identifier for the associated sales or purchase order.

columns.name: shipment_type
columns.description: Type of shipment such as Inbound, Outbound, or Return.

columns.name: shipment_status
columns.description: Current status of the shipment such as Pending, In Transit, Delivered, Delayed, Returned, or Cancelled. Used for logistics performance reporting, shipment tracking, delivery monitoring, exception management, and customer service analysis.

columns.name: carrier_name
columns.description: Name of the logistics carrier responsible for shipment delivery.

columns.name: tracking_number
columns.description: Tracking number provided by the carrier for shipment monitoring.

columns.name: source_location
columns.description: Origin location from which the shipment was dispatched.

columns.name: destination_location
columns.description: Final destination location for the shipment.

columns.name: dispatch_date
columns.description: Date when the shipment departed from the origin location. Used for logistics reporting, transportation lead time analysis, shipment performance monitoring, and delivery tracking.

columns.name: expected_delivery_date
columns.description: Promised or planned delivery date communicated to the customer or receiving location. Used for on-time delivery analysis, logistics planning, customer service reporting, and shipment performance evaluation.

columns.name: actual_delivery_date
columns.description: Actual date when the shipment was successfully delivered. Used for on-time delivery KPI calculations, logistics efficiency reporting, transportation performance analysis, and customer satisfaction monitoring.

columns.name: freight_cost
columns.description: Transportation and logistics cost associated with the shipment. Used for logistics cost analysis, profitability analysis, carrier performance evaluation, transportation budgeting, and cost-to-serve calculations.

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the shipment record was created.

columns.name: purchase_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each purchase transaction.

columns.name: supplier_id
columns.description: Unique identifier of the supplier providing the product.

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Unique identifier of the purchased product.

columns.name: purchase_order_number
columns.description: Business purchase order number used to track procurement transactions.

columns.name: purchase_date
columns.description: Date when the purchase order was created or issued to the supplier. Primary time dimension for procurement analysis. Used for procurement reporting, supplier performance analysis, purchasing trend analysis, lead time calculations, inventory replenishment planning, and spend management reporting.

columns.name: ordered_quantity
columns.description: Quantity of product requested from the supplier. Used for procurement volume reporting, supplier demand analysis, inventory replenishment planning, demand forecasting, and purchasing trend analysis.

columns.name: received_quantity
columns.description: Quantity of product actually received from the supplier. Used for supplier fulfillment analysis, purchase receipt accuracy calculations, inventory replenishment monitoring, and supplier performance reporting.

columns.name: unit_price
columns.description: Purchase price per unit of the product.

columns.name: total_amount
columns.description: Total monetary value of the purchase transaction. Used for procurement spend analysis, supplier spend reporting, purchasing trend analysis, budgeting, cost control initiatives, and supplier performance evaluation.

columns.name: payment_status
columns.description: Payment status such as Paid, Unpaid, Partially Paid, or Overdue.

columns.name: delivery_status
columns.description: Delivery status such as Pending, Partial, Complete, or Delayed.

columns.name: expected_receipt_date
columns.description: Expected date when ordered goods should be received.

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the purchase record was created.

columns.name: sales_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each sales transaction.

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Unique identifier of the customer who placed the order.

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Unique identifier of the product sold.

columns.name: sales_order_number
columns.description: Business sales order number used to track customer orders.

columns.name: sales_date
columns.description: Date when the sales transaction occurred. Used for daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, and yearly sales reporting, revenue trend analysis, period-over-period comparisons, time-based aggregations, sales forecasting, and filtering transactions for specific reporting periods.

columns.name: quantity_sold
columns.description: Quantity of product sold in the transaction. Used for sales volume reporting, demand forecasting, product performance analysis, inventory planning, inventory turnover calculations, market demand analysis, and sales trend reporting across time periods and regions.

columns.name: unit_price
columns.description: Selling price per unit of the product.

columns.name: discount_amount
columns.description: Total discount applied to the sales transaction.

columns.name: tax_amount
columns.description: Tax amount charged on the sales transaction.

columns.name: total_sales_amount
columns.description: Final sales revenue amount after discounts and taxes. Primary measure used for revenue reporting, sales performance analysis, customer revenue contribution analysis, product sales analysis, regional revenue reporting, profitability analysis, sales forecasting, executive dashboards, and financial KPI calculations.

columns.name: sales_channel
columns.description: Channel through which the sale was completed, such as Online, Retail, Distributor, or Direct Sales. Used for channel performance reporting, revenue attribution, customer purchasing behavior analysis, sales mix analysis, profitability comparisons, and channel strategy evaluation.

columns.name: payment_method
columns.description: Method used by the customer to make payment.

columns.name: order_status
columns.description: Current lifecycle status of the sales order such as Open, Completed, Cancelled, Returned, or Pending. Used for order fulfillment reporting, cancellation analysis, return analysis, operational performance monitoring, and sales pipeline tracking.

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the sales record was created.

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Unique identifier for each customer.

columns.name: customer_name
columns.description: Full name or business name of the customer.

columns.name: customer_type
columns.description: Business classification of the customer such as Retail, Wholesale, Corporate, Distributor, or Strategic Account. Used for customer segmentation, revenue analysis by customer segment, profitability analysis, pricing strategy evaluation, and market performance reporting.

columns.name: email
columns.description: Primary email address of the customer.

columns.name: phone_number
columns.description: Primary contact phone number of the customer.

columns.name: address_line1
columns.description: Primary street address of the customer.

columns.name: city
columns.description: Customer city used for city-level sales analysis, customer segmentation, demand forecasting, and geographical performance reporting.

columns.name: state
columns.description: Customer state or province. Primary geographic dimension used for regional sales reporting, territory performance analysis, market penetration analysis, customer segmentation, geographic demand forecasting, regional profitability analysis, and location-based revenue reporting.

columns.name: country
columns.description: Customer country used for country-level sales reporting, international business analysis, market expansion analysis, and global revenue performance tracking.

columns.name: postal_code
columns.description: Customer postal or ZIP code used for localized sales analysis, delivery coverage analysis, logistics planning, and geographic demand distribution reporting.

columns.name: registration_date
columns.description: Date when the customer account was created or registered. Used for customer acquisition reporting, cohort analysis, retention analysis, customer growth tracking, and new customer trend analysis.

columns.name: loyalty_points
columns.description: Accumulated loyalty or reward points earned by the customer.

columns.name: customer_status
columns.description: Current customer status such as Active, Inactive, Suspended, or Prospect.

columns.name: created_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the customer record was created.
